how_it_works.title: Describe Your Coffee Shop
how_it_works.description: Tell us about the concept, signature coffee, and atmosphere — AI will understand the style.

how_it_works.title: AI Creates the Website
how_it_works.description: Ready design with menu, contacts, and photos will appear in seconds.

how_it_works.title: Publish
how_it_works.description: Add photos, enter address, and publish — website goes live immediately.

faq.question: Can I add a menu with prices for coffee and desserts?
faq.answer: Yes, drinks and pastries menus with prices are easily published on the website and updated anytime.

faq.question: How will customers find my coffee shop online?
faq.answer: Website is SEO-optimized — it will appear in Google and Yandex results for coffee shop queries in your city.

faq.question: Is it suitable for a small coffee corner?
faq.answer: Yes, the builder works for any format — from a mini coffee corner to a full-fledged establishment.

faq.question: Can I show opening hours and address?
faq.answer: Of course — a contact block with address, phone, and opening hours is displayed on every page.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create a coffee shop website?
faq.answer: You can create a website for free. Paid plans unlock custom domain and advanced features.

faq.question: Will the website work on smartphones?
faq.answer: Yes, Promto websites are fully responsive for mobile devices and tablets.

cta_mid_title: Create Your Coffee Shop Website in 5 Minutes
